faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a wasp nest in Hollis?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day wasp removal services throughout Hollis, Queens. Our team responds quickly to emergency situations, especially when nests are located near entryways or high-traffic areas of your property. Most wasp nest removals are completed within one visit.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 wasp removal service?
faqs.answer: Our service includes a thorough property inspection, safe nest removal or treatment, elimination of visible wasps, preventative measures to discourage future nesting, and a follow-up guarantee. Pricing varies based on nest size, location, and accessibility.

faqs.question: Are wasp treatments safe for my family and pets in Hollis?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and methods that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We provide clear instructions for any brief precautionary periods and ensure all treatments meet strict safety standards for residential use.

faqs.question: What types of wasps are common in Hollis, Queens?
faqs.answer: Hollis properties commonly deal with yellow jackets, paper wasps, and bald-faced hornets. These species often build nests in attics, under eaves, in trees, and around shed areas. Our technicians are experienced in identifying and safely removing all wasp species found in Queens.
